zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir James Cromer於1440年出生在英國肯特彤絲朵時，他的父親Sir William Cromer24歲，母親Elizabeth Fiennes15歲。他於1459年與Catherine Cantelowe在英國肯特彤絲朵結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1505年在英國肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cromer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of Kromer and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Cromer, which is very rare in Germany, is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine); compare 2 below.
French: from an ancient Germanic personal name, Hrodmar, composed of the elements hrōd ‘renown, glory’ + mār ‘famous’. Compare 1 above.

variants.name: Kromer
meanings: German (also Krömer): occupational name for a small retailer, a variant of Krämer (see Kramer ). Compare Kroemer .
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): occupational name for a small retailer, from Yiddish krom ‘small shop’ (compare 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir James Cromer was born in 1440, in Tunstall, Kent, England, his father, Sir William Cromer, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Fiennes, was 15. He married Catherine Cantelowe in 1459, in Tunstall, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1505, in East Peckham, Kent, England, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir James Cromer est né en 1440, à Tunstall, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Cromer, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Fiennes, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Cantelowe en 1459, à Tunstall, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1505, à East Peckham, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir James Cromer 1440 in Tunstall, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Cromer 24 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Fiennes 15. Er hat 1459 in Tunstall, Kent, England Catherine Cantelowe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1505 im Alter von 65 Jahren in East Peckham, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Cromer è nato il nel 1440 nel Tunstall, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir William Cromer, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Fiennes, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Cantelowe nel 1459, nel Tunstall, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1505, nel East Peckham, Kent, England, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir James Cromerが1440年にイギリスケントトゥンスタルで生まれた時，父Sir William Cromerは24歳，母Elizabeth Fiennesは15歳であった。1459年にイギリスケントトゥンスタルでCatherine Canteloweと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1505年にイギリスケントエアスト ペックハムで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir James Cromer(이)가 1440년 영국 켄트 툰스탤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Cromer(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Fiennes(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1459년 영국 켄트 툰스탤에서 Catherine Cantelowe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1505년 영국 켄트 이스트 펙함에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir James Cromer nasceu em 1440, em Tunstall, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Cromer, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Fiennes, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Cantelowe em 1459, em Tunstall, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1505, em East Peckham, Kent, Inglaterra, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir James Cromer родился в 1440 г. в местности тунсталл, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Cromer было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Fiennes, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Cantelowe в 1459 г. в местности тунсталл, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1505 г. в местности эаст пеккхам, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir James Cromer nació en 1440, en Tunstall, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Cromer, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Fiennes, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Catherine Cantelowe en 1459, en Tunstall, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1505, en East Peckham, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años.
